summary: Test suite has good structure and covers main happy paths (secret classification, output formats, exit codes, act workflow integration) but insufficient coverage of error paths and edge cases. Config validation errors (invalid JSON, missing fields, malformed dates in fixtures) are not tested. Boundary conditions (days_until exactly 0, future dates, rotation_days=0) are absent. No verification of shellcheck/bash -n syntax validation. Fixtures and workflow file are referenced but not shown, making full validation impossible. Would catch major regressions but miss subtle bugs in config parsing or date calculations.
